description: Configurable parameters for AWS Network Flow Monitor Agent v1.1.3-eksbuild.3

additionalLabels.description: Additional labels that will be applied to every object

caCerts.description: Configuration for mounting custom CA bundles from Kubernetes Secrets

enabled.description: Enable mounting of custom CA bundle. Set to true to mount CA certificates from a Kubernetes Secret

fileName.description: Name of the file as it will appear in the container filesystem. Defaults to ca-bundle.crt

mountPath.description: Directory path where the CA bundle will be mounted inside the container. Defaults to /etc/ssl/certs

secretKey.description: Key within the Kubernetes Secret that contains the CA bundle. Defaults to ca-bundle.crt

secretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing the CA bundle. The secret must exist in the same namespace as the agent. You can create the secret as such: kubectl create secret generic ca-cert-bundle --from-file=ca-bundle.crt=/path/to/your/ca-bundle.crt --namespace=<agent-namespace>

caCerts.title: Custom CA Bundle Configuration

env.description: Fields defined here will be fed to the agent as environment variables

CUSTOM_INGESTION_ENDPOINT.description: Custom endpoint URL for the agent to send the reports to, instead of sending to default NFM endpoint https://networkflowmonitorreports.$region.api.aws/publish. Useful for sending reports to self managed OTLP collectors.

OPEN_METRICS.description: Enable or disable open metrics. Disabled if not supplied

OPEN_METRICS_ADDRESS.description: IP address for open metrics endpoint. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 if not supplied

OPEN_METRICS_PORT.description: Port number for open metrics endpoint. Defaults to 80 if not supplied

RUST_LOG.description: Log level for the Rust application https://docs.rs/env_logger/latest/env_logger

env.title: Environment Variables

priorityClassName.description: Priority class for the NetworkFlowMonitorAgent Daemonset

title: Root Schema
